hero.title: B2B Inquiry Portal for Laptop Components
hero.subtitle: Sell parts and accessories with structured product data for enterprise buyers.
hero.description: Browse parts by manufacturer item number, specification, or laptop model, then submit a commercial inquiry in your preferred language.

services.title: Part-based Catalog
services.subtitle: Precise part number and specs.
services.description: Display inventory by part number, technical parameters, and compatibility details for OEM components.

services.title: Model-based Search
services.subtitle: Find parts by laptop model.
services.description: Let buyers search by model names like HP 840 G3 BATTERY to find compatible replacements quickly.

services.title: Multi-language Inquiry
services.subtitle: Chinese and English support.
services.description: A bilingual site for international B2B audiences with an easy inquiry workflow.

products.partBasedDescription: Exact part numbers with parameters allow buyers to confirm compatibility before inquiry.
products.modelBasedDescription: Search using model names like HP 840 G3 BATTERY and match parts instantly.

items.title: HP 840 G3 Battery
items.description: Battery for HP 840 G3 notebooks with stable runtime and reliable performance.

items.title: Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon Adapter
items.description: Compatible power adapter for ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 6 laptops.

contact.headline: Submit an Inquiry
contact.description: Send us product codes, model names, quantity, and delivery requirements for a fast B2B quote.

hero.title: 笔记本电脑零件 B2B 询盘平台
hero.subtitle: 为企业采购提供零件编号、参数和电脑型号两种查询方式。
hero.description: 通过零件编码或机型名称查找备件，支持多语言展示和询盘流程。

services.title: 按零件编号查询
services.subtitle: 提供精确的零件编码与参数。
services.description: 按零件编号展示电池、键盘、适配器等配件的详细规格和库存。

services.title: 按电脑型号查询
services.subtitle: 支持机型名称快速匹配。
services.description: 例如 HP 840 G3 BATTERY、ThinkPad X1 Carbon 等机型，可直接定位兼容配件。

services.title: 多语言询盘
services.subtitle: 中文、英文双语支持。
services.description: 满足国内外客户的采购需求，提升企业客户沟通效率。

products.partBasedDescription: 通过零件编号和参数确认兼容性后再进行采购询盘。
products.modelBasedDescription: 输入机型名称，如 HP 840 G3 BATTERY，快速匹配对应备件。

items.title: HP 840 G3 电池
items.description: 适用于 HP 840 G3 笔记本的电池，续航稳定可靠。

items.title: ThinkPad X1 Carbon 适配器
items.description: 适用于 ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 6 的电源适配器。

contact.headline: 提交询盘
contact.description: 请填写零件编号、机型、数量和交付要求，我们会尽快为您报价。
